name: docusign
description: Send documents for e-signature and track DocuSign envelopes, recipients, and signed documents

envVars.name: DOCUSIGN_CLIENT_ID
envVars.description: DocuSign integration key (OAuth client ID) from Apps and Keys

envVars.name: DOCUSIGN_CLIENT_SECRET
envVars.description: DocuSign OAuth secret key generated for the integration key

tools.name: Get User Info
tools.description: Get the connected user's accounts from the OAuth userinfo endpoint - the source of the accountServer (base_uri host) and accountId values every other tool needs

tools.name: List Envelopes
tools.description: List envelope status changes in an account to track what is sent, delivered, or completed

accountServer.description: Account base host from the base_uri returned by /oauth/userinfo, e.g. na3.docusign.net (production) or demo.docusign.net (developer)

from_date.description: Only envelopes with status changes on or after this ISO 8601 date, e.g. 2026-05-01. The API requires from_date, envelope_ids, or transaction_ids.

status.description: Comma-separated statuses to include: created, sent, delivered, signed, completed, declined, voided, deleted, or timedout

search_text.description: Free-text search across sender, recipient, subject, and envelope ID

start_position.description: Zero-based index of the first record to return, for pagination

tools.name: Get Envelope
tools.description: Get the status and details of a single envelope by ID

accountServer.description: Account base host from the base_uri returned by /oauth/userinfo, e.g. na3.docusign.net (production) or demo.docusign.net (developer)

include.description: Comma-separated extra data to include, such as recipients, documents, custom_fields, or tabs

tools.name: List Envelope Recipients
tools.description: List the recipients of an envelope and their signing status

accountServer.description: Account base host from the base_uri returned by /oauth/userinfo, e.g. na3.docusign.net (production) or demo.docusign.net (developer)

include_tabs.description: Whether to include each recipient's tabs (signature fields) in the response

tools.name: Create and Send Envelope
tools.description: Create an envelope with documents and recipients and send it for signature

accountServer.description: Account base host from the base_uri returned by /oauth/userinfo, e.g. na3.docusign.net (production) or demo.docusign.net (developer)

emailSubject.description: Subject line of the signing request email

documents.description: Documents to sign, each with documentBase64 (base64-encoded file content), name, fileExtension (e.g. pdf), and documentId (e.g. "1")

status.description: Set to "sent" to send immediately or "created" to save as a draft

emailBlurb.description: Optional message included in the signing request email

tools.name: Resend Envelope
tools.description: Resend the signing request email to an in-progress envelope's pending recipients, e.g. to chase outstanding signers

accountServer.description: Account base host from the base_uri returned by /oauth/userinfo, e.g. na3.docusign.net (production) or demo.docusign.net (developer)

envelopeId.description: Envelope ID (GUID) to resend; the envelope must be in progress (not draft, voided, or completed)

resend_envelope.description: Keep true to resend the envelope to recipients who have not yet completed signing

tools.name: List Templates
tools.description: List the reusable envelope templates in an account, e.g. to find a template before sending from it

accountServer.description: Account base host from the base_uri returned by /oauth/userinfo, e.g. na3.docusign.net (production) or demo.docusign.net (developer)

search_text.description: Search template names for this text (max 48 characters)

order_by.description: Sort order: name, modified, or used

count.description: Maximum templates to return; use start_position to page

start_position.description: Zero-based index of the first record to return, for pagination

tools.name: Download Envelope Documents
tools.description: Download all documents of an envelope as a single combined PDF

accountServer.description: Account base host from the base_uri returned by /oauth/userinfo, e.g. na3.docusign.net (production) or demo.docusign.net (developer)

certificate.description: Whether to include the certificate of completion in the combined PDF

prompts.title: Check envelope status
prompts.prompt: List my recent DocuSign envelopes and summarize which are completed, awaiting signature, declined, or voided.

prompts.title: Send a document for signature
prompts.prompt: Send a document I provide for signature via DocuSign to a recipient I specify, then confirm the envelope was sent.

prompts.title: Chase outstanding signers
prompts.prompt: Find DocuSign envelopes still awaiting signature, list who has not signed yet, and draft follow-up messages.

SETUP_GUIDE.title: DocuSign setup

steps.title: Create a free developer account
steps.description: Sign up at https://developers.docusign.com (free developer sandbox). Developer accounts authenticate via https://account-d.docusign.com and use the demo API host https://demo.docusign.net; production uses https://account.docusign.com and your account's own base host. This connector is configured for production - for sandbox testing, swap the auth URLs to account-d.docusign.com.

steps.title: Create an app and integration key
steps.description: In the developer account, open Settings (Admin), then Apps and Keys, and create a new app. Copy the integration key (this is DOCUSIGN_CLIENT_ID), generate a secret key (DOCUSIGN_CLIENT_SECRET), and add your redirect URI ending in /oauth/callback/docusign.

steps.title: Find your account server and account ID
steps.description: After connecting, call GET https://account.docusign.com/oauth/userinfo (or account-d.docusign.com for developer accounts) with your access token. The response lists your accounts, each with an account_id (GUID) and a base_uri such as https://na3.docusign.net. Use the base_uri host as the accountServer parameter (e.g. na3.docusign.net, or demo.docusign.net for developer accounts) and account_id as accountId. Admins can also see the API Account ID under Settings, then Apps and Keys.

steps.title: Verify access
steps.description: Run the List Envelopes tool with your accountServer, accountId, and a from_date such as the first day of last month.

steps.title: Go live for production
steps.description: Apps built in the developer sandbox must pass DocuSign's go-live review before they can use production accounts. Until then, keep using the developer environment.

notes: The eSignature REST base URL is account-specific: https://{base_uri host}/restapi/v2.1/accounts/{accountId}/... - both values come from /oauth/userinfo
The signature scope covers sending and tracking envelopes; the optional extended scope lets refresh tokens be renewed beyond 30 days
List Envelopes requires from_date (or specific envelope IDs); Download Envelope Documents returns raw PDF bytes
